themes.label: Presence
themes.summary: This chapter highlights God’s nearness, abiding presence, indwelling, or covenant companionship. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 5 verses. Commentary leans on "Joshua commands the priests to take up the ark and march before it, with armed men preceding...". Word-study detail reinforces "אֶל: - near, with or among; often in general, to".

themes.label: Covenant
themes.summary: This chapter points to covenant, promise, oath, inheritance, or the enduring faithfulness of God. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 3 verses. Commentary leans on "Jericho was the first Canaanite city Israel conquered in Canaan proper, serving as the strate...". Word-study detail reinforces "בְּרִ֣ית: of the covenant - a compact (because made by passing between pieces of flesh)".
